landing.heroDescription: Create traders that combine the LLM, exchange, and strategy you prefer. From GPT-4o to DeepSeek, from Binance to Hyperliquid. Paper trading and live trading in one platform.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Professional trading tools powered by artificial intelligence, accessible from any device.
landing.featureMultiLLMDesc: Choose from GPT-4o, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok and more. Each trader uses the model you prefer.
landing.featureMultiExchangeDesc: Connect Binance, Bybit, OKX, Bitget, KuCoin, Gate, Hyperliquid and more. CEX and DEX in one platform.
landing.featureStrategyStudioDesc: Configure indicators (RSI, MACD, EMA, ATR), timeframes, coin selection and custom prompts visually.
landing.featureDebateArenaDesc: Up to 4 LLMs analyze the market independently and a moderator synthesizes the optimal decision.
landing.featureBacktestLabDesc: Test your strategy with historical data. Visualize equity curves, Sharpe ratio, drawdown and win rate.
landing.featureRiskManagerDesc: Automatic circuit breaker, stop-loss, take-profit, leverage limits and per-position exposure control.
landing.howStep1Desc: Add your LLM API key (OpenRouter, OpenAI, etc.) and exchange key (Binance, Bybit, etc.). Everything encrypted with AES-256.
landing.howStep2Desc: Use Strategy Studio to select coins, technical indicators, timeframes and risk parameters.
landing.howStep3Desc: Combine LLM + Exchange + Strategy into a trader. Start with paper trading or go live directly.
landing.howStep4Desc: Your trader analyzes the market, makes decisions and executes orders autonomously. You just monitor.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your trading style. Cancel anytime.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Access the complete platform with autonomous traders, multi-LLM and advanced analysis.
landing.footerDisclaimer: ⚠️ Disclaimer: AI trading involves significant risks. Recommended for learning/research or small amounts.

landing_plans.free_3: Base LLM Models (GPT-4o mini, DeepSeek Lite)
landing_plans.enterprise_2: API & MCP Server (Claude, Cursor, VS Code)

nav.upgradeDesc: Unlock Debate Arena, Backtest and more.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account details.
profile.avatarDesc: Your profile picture is handled by your Google account or a default avatar.

dashboard.recentTradesDesc: Latest decisions from your AI agents
dashboard.emptyHistoryDesc: Active agents will log their moves here once they start analyzing the market.

billing.title: Subscription & Payments
billing.subtitle: Manage your current plan, platform limits and payment methods.
billing.noActiveSub: No active subscription. Choose a plan to continue.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Brokiax account
auth.registerSubtitle: Start trading with AI in minutes
